heading: Reports of promotion boards: review by Secretary
label: 14110 Reports of promotion boards: review by Secretary
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 5898(a) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1629(b)(2)
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1996section 1691(b)(1) of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title

children.heading: .—Review of Report
children.label: a .—Review of Report
children.text: Upon receipt of the report of a promotion board submitted under , the Secretary of the military department concerned shall review the report to determine whether the board has acted contrary to law or regulation or to guidelines furnished the board under . Following that review, unless the Secretary concerned makes a determination as described in subsection (b), the Secretary shall submit the report as required by .section 14109(a) of this titlesection 14107(a) of this titlesection 14111 of this title

children.heading: .—Return of Report for Further Proceedings
children.label: b .—Return of Report for Further Proceedings
children.text: If, on the basis of a review of the report under subsection (a), the Secretary of the military department concerned determines that the board acted contrary to law or regulation or to guidelines furnished the board under , the Secretary shall return the report, together with a written explanation of the basis for such determination, to the board for further proceedings. Upon receipt of a report returned by the Secretary concerned under this subsection, the selection board (or a subsequent selection board convened under for the same grade and competitive category) shall conduct such proceedings as may be necessary in order to revise the report to be consistent with law, regulation, and such guidelines and shall resubmit the report, as revised, to the Secretary in accordance with .section 14107(a) of this titlesection 14101(a) of this titlesection 14109 of this title
